name: Albert and Puzzle Mansion
short_description: Are you ready for a block-pushing puzzle game with increasingly challenging levels? Every push (and magnetic pull) counts as one move. By figuring out the optimal solution for a level, you unlock its achievement. Are you clever enough to earn them all?
detailed_description:
Are you ready for a block-pushing puzzle game with increasingly challenging levels?

Every push (and magnetic pull) counts as one move. By figuring out the optimal solution for a level, you unlock its achievement. Are you clever enough to earn them all?

Albert’s cat has been abducted by an evil puzzle master. Enter the mansion, solve all 10 handcrafted puzzles, and bring the cat home.
about_the_game:
